summary: The Flysurfer Soul 3 is a closed-cell foil kite designed for all-around use including land kiting, snow kiting, and water. Its easy relaunch and forgiving nature make it accessible to all levels while delivering excellent light wind performance.
best_for: All-around foil kite riders and multi-surface kiters

sources.summary: Popular among riders who want a foil kite that works on water, snow, and land. The Soul 3's easy relaunch sets it apart from traditional open-cell foils.
Reviewer demonstrates the Soul 3's versatility across multiple surfaces and praises its beginner-friendly handling while noting it still performs well for experienced riders.
Recommended for riders interested in foil kites but intimidated by open-cell designs. The closed-cell construction makes water relaunch straightforward.

reviews.excerpt: [Music] in this video we'll be reviewing the fly Surfer Soul 3 we were excited to try this kite to see what had been changed as well as to share it with our friends to get their honest unbiased opinions we were able to try the soul three in a variety of conditions and spots including this year's KP classic event I that was a blast it was different
reviews.verdict: pletely different kite I felt it it's like soul soul three it flies much better I definitely buy one no it was good I definitely want to give it another shot again maybe a bigger kite get big floats and it was a blast it's a great feel on these ones compared to what I had experience before it's it's a big step up let us know what you think of the Soul 3 are you excited to try it or have you already drop us a comment below as always thank you so much for watching and we'll see you in the next one
